data.name: Security Guard Sex - Episode 2
data.detailed_description:
A visual novel series with animations about a guy working as a security guard: things take a wild turn when he notices a steamy scene between two women in the clothing boutique on his cameras.

GAME DESCRIPTION

Jeff is a bored security officer who watches over a stylish boutique through security cameras. He thinks it’s just another dull day at work, but things quickly change.
Sabrina, a young and attractive woman, enters the store hoping to find something to surprise her boyfriend.
Tiffany, the friendly sales assistant, is eager to help her choose some sexy lingerie.
But as they head to the fitting room, things start to heat up between them, and Jeff witnesses a surprisingly intimate moment.
Faced with the situation, Jeff has to decide what to do. Should he step in and stop them, or just keep watching quietly?
Security Guard Sex offers a story with arousing dialogue, realistic-looking characters, and high-definition graphics.

FEATURES

- HD renders and animations
- Video and image gallery

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
